domains.rationale: Official Google developer documentation and support site for Google Maps Platform, including product docs, getting started guides, API references, and support pages.
Official Google Maps Platform marketing and product site, hosting product descriptions, blog content, support resources, and contact pages.
Official Google Cloud domain hosting Google Maps Platform terms and technical support service guidelines, which are authoritative for product behavior and support policy.

elements.label: A first remote terminal receives an address and event data and uses a database to correlate the address to location-based data.
search_queries: Google Maps Platform Geocoding API address lookup
Places API place details address geocode
address to coordinates Geocoding API
location data from address Google Maps Platform

elements.label: A second terminal includes a map display and receives location-based data from a location system based on the second terminal's own location.
search_queries: Maps SDK for Android map display location
Maps SDK for iOS map display markers
Maps JavaScript API custom maps markers
Navigation SDK map display GPS location

elements.label: The second terminal transmits its location-based data to the first terminal over a communication channel.
search_queries: Maps SDK for Android location data transmission
Maps SDK for iOS send location data
Google Maps Platform location sharing communication
Navigation SDK driver location updates

elements.label: The first terminal stores the second terminal's location-based data in memory.
search_queries: Google Maps Platform store location data memory
Maps SDK for Android retain location updates
Maps SDK for iOS cache location data
location data storage dispatch system

elements.label: When the stored location-based data and the event data satisfy specified criteria, the first terminal sends the correlated location data and event data to the second terminal.
search_queries: Routes API dispatch criteria travel time
Distance Matrix API travel distance criteria
event triggered location dispatch
conditional send location data

elements.label: The second terminal automatically loads the received location-based data into the display unit to show a map containing the first address.
search_queries: Maps JavaScript API auto update map
Maps SDK for Android automatic map update
Maps SDK for iOS display map address

urls.title: Google Maps Platform Documentation | Geocoding API
urls.snippet: Get the geographic coordinates for an address. Reverse address lookup. Get the address for a set of lat/lng coordinates.
urls.rationale: Official Geocoding API documentation explicitly says it gets geographic coordinates for an address and supports address lookup/geocoding, directly matching address-to-location correlation.

urls.title: Geocoding API overview
urls.snippet: The Geocoding API is a service that accepts a place as an address, latitude and longitude coordinates, or Place ID. It converts the address into latitude ...
urls.rationale: Geocoding API overview states the service accepts an address and converts it into latitude/longitude, which is direct evidence for correlating an address to location-based data.

urls.title: Get Started with the Geocoding API v3
urls.snippet: The Geocoding API is a service that provides geocoding and reverse geocoding of addresses. This service is also available as part of the client-side Google Maps ...
urls.rationale: Official getting-started page says the Geocoding API provides geocoding and reverse geocoding of addresses, directly supporting the address lookup limitation.

urls.title: Get Started with the Geocoding API v4
urls.snippet: You can also use the Geocoding API to find the address for a given place ID and to retrieve detailed information about various destinations using the ...
urls.rationale: Geocoding API v4 getting started page says the API can find an address for a place ID and retrieve destination details, directly evidencing geocoding/address correlation.

urls.title: Geocode an address | Geocoding API
urls.snippet: Geocoding translates an address into a location on a map. When you geocode an address, the response contains the: Place ID of the location; Latitude and ...
urls.rationale: Canonical Geocoding API doc explicitly says geocoding translates an address into a location on a map and returns place ID, latitude, and longitude, directly matching address-to-location correlation.

urls.title: Geocoding API v4 overview
urls.snippet: The Geocoding API is a service that accepts a place as an address, latitude and longitude coordinates, or Place ID. It converts the address into latitude ...
urls.rationale: Official overview states the Geocoding API accepts an address and converts it into latitude/longitude, directly evidencing address lookup and correlation to location data.

urls.title: Driver SDK on-demand trips overview
urls.snippet: The Driver SDK communicates vehicle location and trip updates to Fleet Engine so that Fleet Engine can track the vehicles and their assigned trips.
urls.rationale: Official overview for Driver SDK says the driver app sends location updates and latitude/longitude to Fleet Engine, supports route/destination updates, and lets drivers navigate in a single app with navigation/map display behavior.

urls.title: Location Data | Maps SDK for Android
urls.snippet: The My Location layer provides a simple way to display a device's location on the map. It does not provide data. The Google Play services Location API is ...
urls.rationale: Official Android Maps SDK page on location data and the My Location layer; supports device-location-based map display and location handling/storage context.

urls.title: Navigation SDK overview
urls.snippet: Reliable turn-by-turn navigation instructions powered by Google Maps. Customized routes based on the latitude/longitude coordinates provided by the Driver SDK.
urls.rationale: Official Navigation SDK docs describe a mobile app with map/navigation display, route and location updates from the Driver SDK, and sending latitude/longitude location updates to Fleet Engine.

urls.title: Get the vehicle ready | Driver SDK for on-demand trips
urls.snippet: The Navigation SDK provides location updates to the Driver SDK through the GMSRoadSnappedLocationProvider class. To receive those updates, you must set up the ...
urls.rationale: Describes enabling location updates, sending regular vehicle updates to Fleet Engine, event listeners for update success/failure, and backend communication tied to vehicle state.
